internal_issues.description: WIN-026 detail_evidence: verbatim duplicate paragraph (~0.05° geometry sentence appeared twice)
WIN-026 detail_verdict_text: misapplied trivial-transcription test. 5,733 km is dome-internal, not textbook physics. Replaced with correct hardcoded-both-sides structural critique.

WIN-026 detail_evidence: 0.05° calculation rhetorical role unclear. Added connector sentence: 0.05 is 9% of Sun's angular diameter, handles short-baseline objection while anti-solar handles decisive case.
WIN-026 tldr_verdict: 'since antiquity' overclaim. Mathematical perspective is Renaissance (~1413-1435), not antiquity. Fixed to 'for centuries'.

WIN-026 defense_survives=3: dome can claim anti-solar convergence is perspective, same as crepuscular. Needs preemptive text: perspective at TWO opposite vanishing points requires parallel rays throughout — incompatible with finite source. Routed to EXP-282.

recommended_actions.action: Analyst Mode 3 (EXP-282): WIN-026 defense neutralization. Write preemptive paragraph: perspective convergence at both solar AND anti-solar vanishing points requires parallel rays throughout the dome cavity — geometrically incompatible with any finite-altitude source regardless of aetheric optics claims.
